name: Execution of Tap Installer Software
notes:
This is rule detects execution of Tap Installer software.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Ian Davis, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Tap Installer Execution
SIGMA Description: Well-known TAP software installation. Possible preparation for data exfiltration using tunneling techniques


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") == 'tapinstall.exe' AND ( LOWER("Process File File Path") != 'c:\\program files\\avast software\\secureline vpn\\tapinstall.exe' AND LOWER("Process File File Path") != 'c:\\program files (x86)\\avast software\\secureline vpn\\tapinstall.exe' ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Execution of Tap Installer Software on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") == 'tapinstall.exe' AND  ( 	LOWER("Process File File Path") != 'c:\\program files\\avast software\\secureline vpn\\tapinstall.exe' 	AND LOWER("Process File File Path") != 'c:\\program files (x86)\\avast software\\secureline vpn\\tapinstall.exe' ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Execution of Tap Installer Software
Event description: Detects execution of Tap Installer software.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
